title: Weapons of Mass Destruction Remake
description: Remake of an older mod that i made, includes some things from lethal company and a nuke.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26dcaef4352db88e0b452289cf526b5089671708.png)

### The shittiest mod ever made please download (good for desintegrating friends!)

**REQUIERES GECKOLIB 4.3.1!!!**

**Includes**:

- a delivery remote that calls a delivery ship
- delivery ship: can be called with a delivery remote, when broken drops goods
- Lethal Company Flashlight: when right clicked gives night vision for 30 sec
- Lethal Company Shovel: deals heavy amounts of damage
- uranium: crafting item
- nuclear bomb (bobm): explodes when right clicked
- nuke remote (wip): spawns a nuke above you

This mod is useful for fucking around and destroing everything
